twitter.post: Ever read a headline and wonder what it actually means for your daily life? We added a 'Why It Matters' section to every story on Headlinne to help you cut through the noise and get the context you need. HEADLINNE.com #News #Journalism

linkedin.title: We decided to stop optimizing our news feed for engagement.
linkedin.body:
Most news apps are built to keep you scrolling as long as possible. They show you whatever gets the most clicks or emotional reactions. When we started building Headlinne, we realized that approach actually makes it harder to stay informed.

So we made a deliberate engineering choice. Instead of optimizing for clicks, we built our algorithm to optimize for breadth and relevance. We want to show you the stories that actually matter to your specific interests, even if they are not the loudest or most sensational headlines of the day.

It was a difficult trade-off to make. It means the feed might feel quieter. It means you might spend less time scrolling, but you will walk away feeling like you actually learned something. We believe quality should always come before quantity when it comes to the news you consume.

This is just one of the ways we are trying to rethink how we get our information.
linkedin.cta: If you are curious about a different way to read the news, you can try it out at HEADLINNE.com.

instagram.title: Top 5 Things In Tech Today

slides.headline: Apple and Google told to ban 'nudify' apps
slides.explanation: San Francisco officials have ordered both tech giants to remove apps that use AI to create non-consensual explicit images. Reports suggest these companies have made millions in fees from these apps.

slides.headline: China's Moonshot AI takes on OpenAI
slides.explanation: A Chinese startup called Moonshot AI has launched a powerful new model named Kimi K3. They claim it can compete directly with top American AI companies like OpenAI and Anthropic.

slides.headline: Florida man arrested in crypto game scam
slides.explanation: A 21-year-old in Florida is accused of stealing over $200,000 in cryptocurrency. Officials say he used malware hidden inside games on the Steam platform to pull off the scheme.

slides.headline: Apple sues OpenAI over trade secrets
slides.explanation: Apple has filed a major lawsuit against OpenAI claiming a pattern of misconduct. The legal complaint mentions that over 400 former Apple employees are now working at the AI company.

slides.headline: Why is Apple picking a fight with OpenAI?
slides.explanation: Apple's new lawsuit against OpenAI is intense and very public. Experts are now debating whether these allegations are serious legal issues or just standard business practices in the tech world.

instagram.caption: It has been a busy day in the tech world. From major lawsuits to new AI rivals and cybercrime crackdowns, we are breaking down the biggest stories you need to know. Get the full scoop on these headlines in the Headlinne app. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.

instagram.title: Top 5 Geopolitics Headlines

slides.headline: US Strikes Iran for Seventh Night
slides.explanation: The US military carried out another night of strikes against Iranian targets near the Strait of Hormuz. Officials say the goal is to weaken Iran's military capabilities as tensions continue to rise.

slides.headline: Whistleblower Sues Over Robodebt Threats
slides.explanation: A key witness in the Australian robodebt investigation is taking the government to court. She claims she was threatened with losing her job before she testified to the royal commission.

slides.headline: Iran Still Holding Strong Despite Strikes
slides.explanation: Leaked US intelligence suggests Iran still has most of its missiles and launchers after weeks of conflict. Diplomatic talks between Washington and Tehran are stalled as the fighting continues.

slides.headline: Zelenskyy Replaces Defense Minister
slides.explanation: Ukraine's president has dismissed his tech-focused defense minister, Mykhailo Fedorov. This sudden change is raising questions about the future of Ukraine's military leadership during the war.

slides.headline: Trump Threatens Canada With Tariffs
slides.explanation: Donald Trump is threatening new tariffs on Canada due to wildfire smoke drifting into US cities. Canadian leader Mark Carney says both nations need to work together to address the climate change driving these fires.

instagram.caption: Here is what you need to know about the world today. From shifting military strategies to political tensions at home, we have the latest updates. Stay informed with Headlinne. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.
